value.found_quote:
## Review and revise the plan in your browser

When the status changes to `◆ ultraplan ready`, open the session link to view the plan on claude.ai.
value.rationale: The page explicitly contains a section titled "Review and revise the plan in your browser" describing the ultraplan feature where users open the session link to view and revise the plan in their browser. Ultraplan is described as being "in research preview," so the lifecycle status is preview.
